MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Josh Friedman, Esq. of Collins + Collins LLP, for Cross-Defendant's Demo Masters, Inc.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

DEFENDANT RNM MANAGEMENT INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Mr. Friedman appeared by ZOOM after the matter was initally called. Mr. Friedman had ZOOM audio issues but could hear the Court on his end. The Court informed Mr. Friedman that it was adopting the tentative ruling. Mr. Friedman provided a "thumbs up" by ZOOM video for the Court.

The tentative ruling was adopted as follows:

Defendant RNM Management, Inc.'s unopposed summary judgment motion against plaintiff Ernesto Perez Ramirez is granted.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
